title: 6 Lives
body:
Step into a fast-paced, strategic PvP experience where every life counts! Players start with multiple lives, each represented by a color with unique buffs:

Dark Green → Light Green: Speed I, Jump Boost I, Regeneration I

Yellow: Speed I, Resistance I

Red: Health Boost I, Resistance I

💥 Combat Rules:

Red players can initiate combat, but anyone can retaliate within 2 minutes.

PvP is free-for-all within the 200-block spawn zone.

Strategic play matters — surviving and managing your lives is key!

Survive, outsmart your opponents, and climb back from the brink! Perfect for small groups or full servers — every fight is intense and unpredictable.

🎮 For Minecraft 1.21.x
